channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Toronto synagogue targeted in shooting; Alberta Premier urges resolution on pipeline agreement
item.description: On Friday, May 8, Toronto police confirmed that 18-year-old Ruslan Novruzov was arrested in connection with a shooting outside the Chasidei Bobov synagogue, where three Jewish individuals were targete...

item.title: Ten People Killed in Head-On Collision on Dalbandin Highway, Balochistan
item.description: In a tragic road accident late on Friday, at least ten people lost their lives and five others sustained serious injuries on Dalbandin highway in Chagai district, Balochistan. According to local polic...

item.title: The case for honesty in political advertising
item.description: Zoë Wundenberg argues that the Farrer by-election has highlighted a troubling trend in Australian politics: the tolerance of deliberate misinformation in political advertising. Candidates and parties ...

item.title: University of Venda cautions students on fraudulent 2027 application link
item.description: The University of Venda (Univen) has issued a warning to prospective students, parents, and guardians about a fake 2027 application link currently circulating on social media. The fraudulent link clai...

item.title: Police Officer Dies, Another Injured During Anti-Drug Operation in Surigao City
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — During an anti-drug operation in Barangay Cagniog, Surigao City, a police officer was fatally shot while another was injured when a suspect turned violent. S/Sgt. Charito ...

item.title: Fidelity Restructures Teams to Focus on Larger, Faster-Moving Groups
item.description: Fidelity Investments is undergoing a major reorganization that is shifting its team structure away from small, agile squads toward larger teams designed to accelerate project delivery. The company is ...

item.title: Trump Uses Government Resources for Personal Business Trips to Golf Events
item.description: President Donald Trump has continued using taxpayer-funded resources to promote his personal businesses, particularly his golf courses and cryptocurrency ventures. Most recently, he flew aboard Marine...

item.title: N.L. Judge Urges Police to Improve Response to Intimate Partner Violence Cases
item.description: A Newfoundland and Labrador provincial court judge, Wayne Gorman, has issued strong criticism of the police for their handling of intimate partner violence (IPV) cases. In a recent sentencing decision...

item.title: PCEA Church Members Demand Justice After Pastor Julius Ndumia Murdered
item.description: Naivasha, Kenya – The Presbyterian Church of East Africa (PCEA) community is in deep mourning following the brutal murder of Pastor Julius Ndumia, who was attacked and killed within the church compoun...

item.title: George and Amal Clooney Celebrate 65th Birthday in St Tropez with Affectionate Outing
item.description: George Clooney celebrated his 65th birthday in St Tropez alongside his wife Amal, 48, in a display of affection that saw the couple laughing, holding hands, and enjoying a leisurely lunch with friends...

item.title: US Military Strike in Eastern Pacific Kills Two on Suspected Drug Trafficking Vessel
item.description: The U.S. military conducted another strike on a suspected drug-trafficking vessel in the eastern Pacific Ocean, resulting in the deaths of two men and leaving one survivor. A video released by U.S. So...

item.title: Trail Firefighter Found Not Guilty in Assault Case Involving Homeless Man
item.description: A Trail, B.C. firefighter, Gregory Ferraby, has been acquitted of assault and uttering threats in relation to an incident in April 2023 involving Darryl Wong, who was homeless at the time. Wong was al...

item.title: 3I/ATLAS Comet Shows Unprecedented Heavy Water, Offering Clues About Cold Alien Worlds
item.description: Astronomers have discovered that the interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS, only the third confirmed object from outside our solar system, contains an unusually high concentration of heavy water, or deuterium-r...

item.title: NSW government injects $40 million to improve firearms registry and safety measures
item.description: The New South Wales government has announced a $39.3 million investment to overhaul the state’s firearm registry and improve public safety in response to the Bondi shooting terror attack in December 2...

item.title: FIFA Cancels World Cup Suspensions for Otamendi and Caicedo
item.description: FIFA has announced that Argentina defender Nicolás Otamendi and Ecuador midfielder Moisés Caicedo will not have to serve their one-game suspensions at the upcoming World Cup, despite receiving red car...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine Agree to Three-Day Ceasefire and Prisoner Swap Following US Mediation
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced on May 8, 2026, that both Russia and Ukraine have agreed to a three-day ceasefire along with an exchange of prisoners. The ceasefire is scheduled from May 9 to May ...

item.title: Sporting Lagos Wins Nigeria National League Title; BetPawa Rewards Clubs and Players
item.description: Sporting Lagos don make history as dem win the 2025/26 Nigeria National League (NNL) Super 4 tournament for Ikenne, Ogun State. The final day drama no easy as three clubs—Sporting Lagos, Inter Lagos, ...

item.title: Supreme Court addresses controversy over Minister's remarks on Colonel Sofiya Qureshi
item.description: The Supreme Court of India recently addressed remarks made by a government minister concerning Colonel Sofiya Qureshi. Although the minister’s statements sparked controversy and widespread debate acro...

item.title: Porsche to discontinue three subsidiaries and cut 500 jobs amid strategic overhaul
item.description: Porsche announced on Friday that it plans to cut over 500 jobs as part of a strategic refocus on its core business. The move involves the closure of three of its subsidiaries: Cellforce Group, Porsche...

item.title: Analysis of Election Commission Data on SIR and West Bengal Poll Results
item.description: The article intended to analyse the potential impact of the Special Investigation Report (SIR) on the results of the West Bengal elections. According to Election Commission data, there is an examinati...
